description: An informal letter, signed statement, or note from a household member or contributor verifying that they provide financial assistance to cover household expenses.

contributor_name.instruction: The full name of the person who is contributing money or paying towards the household expenses.

recipient_name.instruction: The full name of the person receiving the financial help or the primary householder named in the letter.

contribution_amount.instruction: The dollar amount of financial assistance or expense coverage specified in the statement.

contribution_frequency.instruction: How often the money is contributed, such as Monthly, Weekly, or One-time, as described in the text.

expense_type.instruction: The specific expenses the money is intended for, if mentioned (e.g., Rent, Utilities, Groceries, or General support).

statement_date.instruction: The date the letter or note was written or signed by the contributor.
